query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.
textResponse:
Here are some of the biggest **AI headlines as of today, Thursday, April 9, 2026**:

1. **Anthropic previews new “Mythos” model for cybersecurity**
   Anthropic unveiled a preview of **Mythos**, which it says is one of its most powerful models yet, as part of a limited cybersecurity program called **Project Glasswing**. According to TechCrunch, Anthropic says partner organizations are using it for defensive security work and vulnerability discovery. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/07/anthropic-mythos-ai-model-preview-security/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Microsoft keeps expanding enterprise AI with new Copilot and agent offerings**
   Microsoft announced **Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot**, broader model support including **Claude and next-gen OpenAI models**, and general availability plans for **Agent 365** and the **Microsoft 365 E7 Frontier Suite**. The company is positioning this as a major push from AI experimentation toward enterprise-scale deployment. ([blogs.microsoft.com](https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/03/09/introducing-the-first-frontier-suite-built-on-intelligence-trust/?utm_source=openai))

3. **Google DeepMind publishes a new framework for measuring AGI progress**
   Google released a paper, **“Measuring Progress Toward AGI: A Cognitive Taxonomy,”** proposing a framework for evaluating AI systems across 10 cognitive abilities. This is notable because it shifts some attention from products to how the industry may define and benchmark “AGI”-like progress. ([blog.google](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/measuring-agi-cognitive-framework?utm_source=openai))

4. **OpenAI Foundation outlines its early 2026 direction**
   OpenAI published an **update on the OpenAI Foundation** on **March 24, 2026**, describing how it is beginning to deploy support and naming leadership for work focused on civil society and philanthropy. While not a model launch, it is one of the more recent OpenAI-related developments with policy and ecosystem significance. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/update-on-the-openai-foundation//?utm_source=openai))

5. **OpenAI continues building out AI infrastructure in the U.S.**
   In January 2026, OpenAI and SoftBank Group’s SB Energy announced a partnership tied to **Stargate**, aimed at building next-generation AI and energy infrastructure in the United States. This remains a major ongoing story because compute and power supply are becoming central to the AI race. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/stargate-sb-energy-partnership//?utm_source=openai))

If you want, I can also give you:
- a **more newsy/top-10 digest** from outlets like Reuters/The Verge/TechCrunch,
- an **OpenAI/Google/Microsoft/Anthropic-only roundup**, or
- a **market-focused AI news brief** with company impact.
